CustomField.description: Stores the Account billing address information at the time of invoice creation. Replaces the formula field S_O_Account_Info__c which is being deprecated. This field is populated by ClientInvoiceTriggers when invoices are created or committed.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Account name and billing address captured at invoice creation/commit time. This field is automatically populated - do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Account Info
